metadata.title: Product Bricks & Capabilities
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the emobility domain.

bricks.name: Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway
bricks.description: Securely connects to chargers via OCPP/OCPP-compliant protocols and manages real-time device interactions.

internalModules.title: Contract and Mapping Layer
internalModules.description: Maintains schemas, field mappings, and versioned contracts used by Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway.

internalModules.title: Transformation and Routing Engine
internalModules.description: Transforms messages and routes requests or events through Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway.

internalModules.title: Access and Observability Controls
internalModules.description: Applies authentication, throttling, retry handling, and monitoring for Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway.

interfaces.title: Inbound API
interfaces.description: API entry point used to submit requests or payloads into Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway.

interfaces.title: Outbound Event Feed
interfaces.description: Event or webhook surface used by Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway to publish downstream updates.

interfaces.title: Partner Connector Surface
interfaces.description: Connector interface for external systems exchanging data through Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Driver Authorization Service to provide identity capabilities required by Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway.
Depends on Session Orchestration to provide operations capabilities required by Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway.
Depends on Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations to provide analytics capabilities required by Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway exchanges operational data with external partner platforms and adjacent systems.
Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway depends on messaging infrastructure to route and buffer integration traffic.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Internal services depend on Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway to connect reliably with partner systems and adjacent platforms.
Partner-facing workflows depend on Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway to exchange data and synchronize state with external parties.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Transaction to support domain workflows.
Reads Consent Record to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Charge Point Management
bricks.description: Platform tools for commissioning, configuring, monitoring, and maintaining large inventories of EV charge points and network assets. It supports multi-tenant and global scale management. (CP Management product) :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}

internalModules.title: Core Domain Engine
internalModules.description: Implements the main business logic and lifecycle handled by Charge Point Management.

internalModules.title: Rules and Administration
internalModules.description: Provides the configuration, rules, and administrative controls required by Charge Point Management.

internalModules.title: Reporting and Exception Handling
internalModules.description: Supports visibility, diagnostics, and manual handling of exceptions in Charge Point Management.

interfaces.title: Service API
interfaces.description: API surface for interacting with the business capabilities implemented by Charge Point Management.

interfaces.title: Operations Workspace
interfaces.description: User interface for administration and operational control of Charge Point Management.

interfaces.title: Domain Event Feed
interfaces.description: Event interface that publishes notable business changes from Charge Point Management.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Driver Authorization Service to provide identity capabilities required by Charge Point Management.
Depends on Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway to provide integration capabilities required by Charge Point Management.
Depends on Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations to provide analytics capabilities required by Charge Point Management.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Charge Point Management exchanges operational state and business records with external back-office systems.
Charge Point Management uses external communication channels to notify users, operators, or partners.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Upstream business workflows depend on Charge Point Management for core domain capabilities and state transitions.
Operations consumers depend on Charge Point Management for administration, visibility, and exception resolution.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Customer Contact Point to support domain workflows.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.

bricks.name: Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations
bricks.description: Provides real-time visibility, diagnostics, alerting, and remote actions across deployed infrastructure.

internalModules.title: Signal Ingestion and Processing
internalModules.description: Collects operational and business signals that feed Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations.

internalModules.title: Metrics and Decision Engine
internalModules.description: Calculates insights, KPIs, forecasts, or scores produced by Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations.

internalModules.title: Reporting and Operations Workspace
internalModules.description: Presents actionable views, alerts, and drill-down workflows for Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations.

interfaces.title: Dashboard Interface
interfaces.description: Interactive reporting or control surface that presents insights from Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations.

interfaces.title: Metrics and Query API
interfaces.description: API for retrieving metrics, scores, forecasts, or analytical outputs from Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations.

interfaces.title: Alert and Signal Feed
interfaces.description: Event or notification interface exposing operational signals generated by Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway to provide integration capabilities required by Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations.
Depends on Session Orchestration to provide operations capabilities required by Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations.
Depends on Charge Point Management to provide service capabilities required by Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations publishes metrics and operational signals into external analytical environments.
Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations depends on external alerting systems to escalate anomalies and operational issues.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Operational teams depend on Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations to monitor health, detect issues, and make decisions.
Analytical and planning consumers depend on Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations for metrics, forecasts, and decision support outputs.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Transaction to support domain workflows.
Reads Consent Record to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Session Orchestration
bricks.description: Manages charging sessions end-to-end including start/stop actions, status correlation, and session data aggregation.

internalModules.title: Workflow and State Engine
internalModules.description: Orchestrates the main lifecycle, state transitions, and task flow handled by Session Orchestration.

internalModules.title: Capacity and Exception Management
internalModules.description: Manages inventory, reservations, workload, and exception handling inside Session Orchestration.

internalModules.title: Operations Console Logic
internalModules.description: Supports operator actions, escalations, and manual interventions required by Session Orchestration.

interfaces.title: Workflow API
interfaces.description: API for starting, updating, or querying operational workflows managed by Session Orchestration.

interfaces.title: Operator Console
interfaces.description: User interface for task handling, interventions, and operational control within Session Orchestration.

interfaces.title: Lifecycle Status Events
interfaces.description: Event stream exposing state changes and exceptions produced by Session Orchestration.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Tariff & Pricing Management to provide policy capabilities required by Session Orchestration.
Depends on Driver Authorization Service to provide identity capabilities required by Session Orchestration.
Depends on Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway to provide integration capabilities required by Session Orchestration.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Session Orchestration coordinates execution with external ERP, servicing, or operations platforms.
Session Orchestration exchanges tasks, statuses, or escalations with customer and operations tooling.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Operational teams and services depend on Session Orchestration to coordinate task flow, status, and exception handling.
Customer and partner-facing journeys depend on Session Orchestration to advance fulfillment, servicing, or case progress.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Identity Credential to support domain workflows.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Session Token.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Access Policy.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.

bricks.name: Driver Authorization Service
bricks.description: Validates tokens, RFID users, and credentials to authorize EV drivers to start charging with policy checks.

internalModules.description: Authenticates actors, evaluates access policies, and manages trust rules for Driver Authorization Service.

internalModules.description: Manages roles, permissions, account state, and lifecycle changes within Driver Authorization Service.

internalModules.title: Audit and Compliance Controls
internalModules.description: Records security-relevant actions and compliance evidence produced by Driver Authorization Service.

interfaces.title: Authentication API
interfaces.description: Programmatic interface for authentication, authorization, or account checks exposed by Driver Authorization Service.

interfaces.title: Administration Console
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing identity settings and access policies in Driver Authorization Service.

interfaces.title: Audit Event Stream
